reference_audit.notes: Canonical test refs were refreshed for the PTO restart negative proof and the runtime no-data PING fallback proof.

notes: The previous generated closeout was stale after later RFC 9002 timer-discipline, probe-scheduler, Retry reset, and key-discard artifacts landed.
Focused requirement-home execution on 2026-04-23 passed all 172 RFC 9002 Section 6 tests with no failures.
The reconciliation does not weaken protocol behavior or reinterpret external interop runner/reporting failures as managed transport success.
